ques: Locate a pre-trained natural language processing model on Hugging Face that specializes in named entity recognition (NER), confirm that the model was last updated in 2024 and has 1M+ downloads.
answer: dslim/bert-base-NER — a BERT-based named entity recognition (Token Classification) model on Hugging Face. Confirmed last updated Oct 8, 2024 and 1,825,052 (≈1.83M) downloads, satisfying the 2024-update and 1M+ download criteria.
